import hashlib, binascii
def check_password(stored, provided):
    salt = stored[:32]
    key = hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac('sha256', provided.encode(), salt, 100000, dklen=128)
    return binascii.hexlify(key).decode() == stored[32:]

import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
def parse_xml(data):
    root = ET.fromstring(data)
    return root.find('name').text

def store_session(user_id):
    session_token = hashlib.sha256(os.urandom(32)).hexdigest()
    redis.setex(f"session:{session_token}", 3600, user_id)
    return session_token

def make_request(url):
    import requests
    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=10, verify=True)
    return resp.text
